reasons: Baxia directly reduces Yu Zhong's sustain value, which is central to Yu Zhong's extended-fight threat.
Baxia can stand in front of Yu Zhong and make his drain-based brawling less rewarding.

proof.summary: Yu Zhong wants to restore HP through stacked Sha Residue in long fights, while Baxia reduces shield and HP regeneration effects when his skills hit enemies.
worksBestWhen: Baxia stays near Yu Zhong during the main fight.
The team focuses Yu Zhong while anti-regen is active.
failureCases: Yu Zhong dives past Baxia into the backline.
Yu Zhong disengages and re-enters after anti-regen timing.

reasons: Karrie punishes Yu Zhong's HP-heavy bruiser style with max-HP true damage.
Yu Zhong must enter Karrie's attack range to threaten her, giving her stacking opportunities if protected.

proof.summary: Yu Zhong wants to survive as a high-HP sustain diver, while Karrie turns repeated hits into true damage based on the target's max HP.
worksBestWhen: Karrie has peel against Yu Zhong's dive.
Yu Zhong's Black Dragon Form is already used or mispositioned.
failureCases: Yu Zhong reaches Karrie without peel.
Karrie is behind on item timing.
Yu Zhong's team zones Karrie out before she stacks marks.

reasons: Dyrroth can punish Yu Zhong in lane with physical-defense reduction and burst.
Yu Zhong needs time to stack sustain, while Dyrroth can pressure before Yu Zhong stabilizes the fight.

proof.summary: Yu Zhong wants extended trades, while Dyrroth's defense reduction and burst pressure can convert short trades into burst wins.
worksBestWhen: Dyrroth trades before Yu Zhong completes sustain stacks.
Dyrroth has lane tempo and avoids extended all-ins without cooldowns.
failureCases: Yu Zhong survives the burst and turns the fight long.
Dyrroth misses his key engage or defense-reduction timing.
Yu Zhong uses Black Dragon Form to disrupt Dyrroth's backline instead.

reasons: X.Borg can pressure Yu Zhong with sustained fire damage and true-damage burst windows.
His armor mechanic gives him a buffer against Yu Zhong's dive and brawl pattern.

proof.summary: Yu Zhong wants to win bruiser fights through sustain, while X.Borg can kite, wear him down, and threaten true-damage detonation through Last Insanity.
worksBestWhen: X.Borg keeps spacing and does not let Yu Zhong stack freely.
X.Borg times ultimate after Yu Zhong commits.
failureCases: Yu Zhong forces X.Borg armorless too early.
X.Borg misses the true-damage detonation timing.
Yu Zhong dives past X.Borg to higher-value targets.

reasons: Valir can delay Yu Zhong's entry before Black Dragon Form or after it ends.
His knockback and slows help the team avoid extended melee contact.

proof.summary: Yu Zhong wants to dive into clustered enemies and extend the fight, while Valir can knock him back, slow his approach, and help the team kite.
worksBestWhen: Valir holds knockback for Yu Zhong's real entry.
The team spreads during Black Dragon Form.
failureCases: Yu Zhong enters while control immune in Black Dragon Form.
Valir is flanked or forced to waste knockback.
Yu Zhong's team follows with layered engage.
